Uses of Class
jline.lang.nodes.Station

  • Packages that use Station 
    Package Description
    jline.api
    This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
    jline.lang
    Classes to declare basic elements of a model
    jline.lang.nodes
    This package contains the classes used the specify Network objects
    jline.solvers
    This package contains the solver superclasses and related data structures
    jline.solvers.fluid.odes
    Classes that generate the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) used in the Fluid solver
    jline.solvers.jmt
    Classes that rely on the Java Modelling Tools (JMT) suite solvers
    jline.solvers.ssa
    Classes that analyze networks using Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA)

      Modifier and Type Method Description

    • Uses of Station in jline.lang.nodes

      Subclasses of Station in jline.lang.nodes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  Delay
      An infinite server station, i.e.
      class  Join
      A node that reassembles a set of sibling tasks into the original parent job
      class  Place
      Place as in a stochastic Petri net model
      class  Queue
      A queueing station within a Network model
      class  Source
      An abstraction of the external world jobs in open classes come from
